chaptertitle.chaptertitle_duel_3: The Client is Always a Fright

chapterblurb.chapterblurb_arch_1: The park is almost fully submerged. It's time to act and act fast!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_arch_2: You've refurbished some of the park, but there's still more to dive into.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_arch_3: The park is slowly returning to its beloved state. Just a little more and it'll be done!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_arch_4: The park's back to its former glory, but why stop there? Surely you have some further improvements bubbling under the surface!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_buil_1: Complete the first flumes to see your Bifröst take shape under Odin's expectant eye.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_buil_2: Get your guests into the Viking spirit by building prestige and satisfying their needs.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_buil_3: There's peace and prosperity among the realms! Now it's time to finish the Bifröst once and for all.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_buil_4: Fine work indeed! A bit more polishing and your kingdom will shine bright like the midnight sun!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_cany_1: The previous owners went into debt before they could get this place off the ground. But not to quarry, start by finishing the Crimson Coaster and bringing in some stone cold cash.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_cany_2: The Crimson Coaster is the shining gem of the park. Now it's time to get bould(er)! Get to work on its Cobalt companion and chip in on some park admin too.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_cany_3: This chasm now features two brilliant coasters, time to improve the scenery around them and build up the park even more!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_cany_4: Brad and Eugene are working together in harmony. Make the park a rocking success in celebration!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_coas_1: If you want this park to hold its water, you're going to need to open rides and reel in some guests.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_coas_2: This park's fortunes are turning around. Keep it up and lure in even more guests with new attractions.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_coas_3: Keep swimming with the current and pulling in profits.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_coas_4: This beach is the place to be, but the park's not out of deep waters yet. Get the loans paid off and bring in huge crowds to make Brad as happy as a clam.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_duel_1: The first demands for the restricted half of the park have come in, and they're… well, they could be worse. Start building the park up and prove Kenta wrong.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_duel_2: Happy guests mean enough cash to meet Kenta's demands. Buff up the park rating and improve your scenery to keep the park (and your budget) in balance.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_duel_3: Kenta is keen to catch you out, but his bite is worse than his park. Keep showing him what Coaster Coast is made of!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_duel_4: Now you're really showing Kenta what Coaster Coast can do! Time to polish up the entire park and turn it into something special.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_ecop_1: Tackle your carbon footprint by reducing litter and harnessing natural materials to build your park from the ground up.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_ecop_2: It's time to get the wheels in motion and give your guests a ride on the green side.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_ecop_3: Your park is flourishing! Now let's get this scenery looking more... green-ery?
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_ecop_4: You've created an ecological haven! But don't stop there. Buy those final plots of land and create the ultimate green dream of a park.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_gard_1: There's lots of work to do here. Olympus wasn't built in a day!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_gard_2: It's time to dive in headfirst and build Poseidon's pool!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_gard_3: It's time to make like the Colossus of Rhodes: bigger and better! Keep opening those rides to keep guests happy.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_gard_4: It's like gazing upon Mount Olympus itself! Now it's time to make the gods truly envious.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_laby_1: There's a hidden world underground, and it's your job to bring history to life with some a-maze-ing attractions!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_laby_2: If the labyrinths of old had coasters with exciting drops in, maybe the minotaur wouldn't have been so angry all the time.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_laby_3: Look at all your guests, engaging with ancient history through the medium of thrills. Just a few more steps and you'll entangle them in a truly captivating experience!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_laby_4: It took a mythical architect to create the labyrinth, and it'll take an equally expert builder to turn it into the ultimate historical theme park. Can you match the legendary artificer's skill?
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lazy_1: The lazy river might be fun, but it's also hellishly hot. Build some water rides to help your guests cool off!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lazy_2: Keep building a waterpark worthy of the legendary underworld! But remember, if there's one thing that Hades takes seriously it's pool cleanliness.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lazy_3: A spectacular water coaster would make this place the envy of Olympus!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lazy_4: You've taken on the sun itself and turned this hot spot into an amazing water park. Keep going and this park will be the holiday destination of the whole pantheon!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lost_1: Restore the first coaster to its former glory. Dig deep into your funds and contend with the twisting causeways of this ancient landmark.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lost_2: Keep the guests coming with breathtaking scenes fit for the annals of ancient history.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lost_3: Make these coasters as exciting as uncovering a long-lost civilisation!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_lost_4: Complete the series of coasters and see history come to life!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_natu_1: Areas with this much potential can't stay empty for long. Start restoring the land to its natural beauty, and bring guests back to the fjord!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_natu_2: Expand your park and bring the Vikings (and more guests) back to these hills!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_natu_3: The Vikings were experts on the water, and they'd have probably been masters of the pool too! Do them proud by expanding the park, and building a pool worthy of a jarl.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_natu_4: This neglected spot has been transformed into a real marvel, but mother nature does nothing in halves. Expand again and make this fjord adored!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_plan_1: You've planted the seeds for success! Now nurture your creations so they grow big and strong.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_plan_2: Your hard work is paying off and things are looking good. Keep working to take this place from 'farm' to 'farm-tastic'!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_plan_3: Your green thumb is showing! Keep working the land and you're in for a bounty of happy guests.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_plan_4: It's almost time to reap what you've sown... Just a little more work and you'll make this place the cream of the crop!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_spli_1: These parks might have different target audiences, but they both need some work. Split your attention and pull in guests to both sides.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_spli_2: Focus in on one park and create the ultimate destination for family fun. Just ignore the thrill-seekers screaming in joy across the river...
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_spli_3: You've made a lovely family destination, time to balance the scales. Cater for the excitement-craving audience of the other side of the park and keep guests on both sides happy.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_spli_4: Very different parks working together in harmony. Beautiful, but it could be beautiful-er. Finish off these parks with some fancy new additions.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tiny_1: You know what would make looking out over three waterfronts even better? Looking at them from incredible rides!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tiny_2: Complete the following equation: Huge exciting coasters plus tiny area equals...
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tiny_3: The smaller the place, the more guests you need. Bring in the masses and turn this pocket park into a roaring success.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tiny_4: Your park is stuffed to the brim with guests and attractions, time to make it burst… with profits!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutb_1: Start simple with the core principles of putting a park together.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutb_2: There isn't a theme park without guests! Okay, there is but it's a very sad affair. Learn to understand your guests, and how to beautify your park to create the ultimate guest experience.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutb_3: The backbone of a park is found in its staff. Treat them well, set them up for success, and your park will surely thrive.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutb_4: You've got the basics and you know how to treat your guests and staff right. Now it's time to learn the ancient art of coaster building!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutw_1: The sloshing heart of a water park is the pool. Learn how to build one that will make any guest want to dive in!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutw_2: As great as the pool is, there's plenty to learn about what happens around it too. Scenery, shops, safety, but never, ever, EVER running.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutw_3: What's better than a pool? Two pools! Build another to keep the fun flowing wave after wave.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_tutw_4: Congratulations! Your induction into Coaster Coast and theme park management is complete, now the real learning begins... But if you want to put your new knowledge into practice, Eugene has you covered.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_twin_1: Time to get this park (way) off the ground by setting up some attractions!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_twin_2: Anyone going to a mountain theme park has two things in common: a love of coasters with big drops, and a lot of spare pants in their luggage.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_twin_3: Your guests have climbed  to the summit of the world, now take them to new heights of excitement!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_twin_4: Fulfilling Hank's vision is close at hand! A little more work and you'll have a park with both attitude and altitude!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_vomi_1: Get to grips with this park's thrills-focused clientele. They'll want some exciting rides, and your janitors will want the best mops that money can buy.
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_vomi_2: Your guests will pay good money for nausea-inducing thrills. Grant their wish and send them, and their stomachs, tumbling!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_vomi_3: As it turns out, making high-nausea rides can lead to a messy park! Who knew? Get on top of your tidying, but don't stop delivering thrills!
chapterblurb.chapterblurb_vomi_4: You've given your guests thrills and now they demand more. Make this the place live up to the title of "Adrenaline Capital of the World".
